title: geum urbanum
intro: Geum urbanum, also known as the wood avens or herb Bennet, is a perennial plant belonging to the rose family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Geum urbanum include relief from digestive issues, such as bloating and indigestion, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Geum urbanum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for internal use, while its roots and leaves can be used in topical applications for skin issues.
